events.name: New York Knicks at Atlanta Hawks

headlines.description: — CJ McCollum hit a fadeaway jumper with 12.5 seconds left to ruin New York's night again, leading the Atlanta Hawks to a 109-108 victory and a 2-1 lead over the Knicks in their first-round...
headlines.shortLinkText: McCollum ruins Knicks' night again, leading the Hawks to a 109-108 victory and a 2-1 lead

headlines.description: — Scottie Barnes set career playoff highs with 33 points and 11 assists, RJ Barrett added a career playoff-high 33 points and the Toronto Raptors beat Cleveland 126-104 on Thursday night, snapping a 12-game playoff losing streak against the Cavaliers.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barnes, Barrett each score 33 as Raptors beat Cavaliers 126-104 to cut series deficit to 2-1
